source: 用户提供的 Chrome 应用商店旅游分类页面文本

items.name: Directo - Travel Deals - Save on Hotels
items.description: Smart travel hack for getting the best hotel deals

items.name: TripChipper (TravelArrow) - Travel Better
items.description: TripChipper is your virtual travel agent that sits in the browser. We help you unlock deals to save big on your next vacation!

items.name: 搜尋平價機票
items.description: 我們會按您搜尋的航班，在網上幫您尋找更低價格，為您節省時間和金錢。

items.name: Points Path for Google Flights
items.description: Add frequent flyer points prices to Google Flights & find the best deal with your travel rewards!

items.name: Tripadvisor: Travel Reviews & Deals on Hotels, Restaurants & Attractions
items.description: Find the best hotels, restaurants, and attractions worldwide with trusted Tripadvisor reviews.

items.name: Ratepunk - Get More Out Of Travel
items.description: The ultimate travel helper: the best hotel price in seconds, price drop alerts after booking & cashback on stays

items.name: CheaperThere | Cheap Flight & Hotel Deals
items.description: We compare cheap flights from the best travel agencies.

items.name: Google Maps Extended Routes
items.description: Improves Google Maps routes planning: editing, optimization and export features. Perfect for cyclists and motorbikers

items.name: Airbnb for Digital Nomads
items.description: AI-powered tools for rental negotiations, weather forecasts, scams, events, visa, and local undiscovered gems.

items.name: Tab With a View
items.description: Open a Tab, Escape Somewhere Beautiful — Pomodoro timer included

items.name: Wanderlust New Tab
items.description: Travel new tab extension with stunning destination photos, trip inspiration, digital nomad tools, and an AI travel assistant.

items.name: Travel Mapper: Save travel plans to Google Sheets
items.description: Easily save travel plans, places, & activities to a Google Sheets itinerary right from any website.

items.name: New York City MeaVana
items.description: Welcome to New York City MeaVana

items.name: Cities of the World MeaVana
items.description: Welcome to Cities of the World MeaVana

items.name: Hotel Ninja: Compare Booking, Expedia & Hotels.com Prices
items.description: Get the cheapest hotel price!

items.name: OpenBnB - Book direct and save!
items.description: Save Up to 20% on Airbnb Stays by Booking Direct

items.name: Google Flights Price Hacker – Save More!
items.description: 🚀 Unlock cheaper flights than Google Flights! Compare instantly & save on every trip with one click. Book for less now!

items.name: San Francisco MeaVana
items.description: Welcome to San Francisco MeaVana

items.name: Join Cherry - Stop Overpaying for Hotels
items.description: Save up to 60% off at 3,000,000+ hotels worldwide.

items.name: Textomap: Generate maps from text in seconds
items.description: Create maps in the same tab as you browse websites, social media, docs, and more

items.name: Vacayos.com: Deals on Premium Hotels
items.description: Vacayos finds you cheaper hotel prices - automatically!

items.name: @Hotel - Hotel Deals - Find Best Hotel Prices
items.description: Same Stay, Smarter Deal. Discover exclusive savings and secret rates instantly.

items.name: Revyu.AI - Your Ultimate Travel Assistant
items.description: Too many reviews? Let Revyu.AI summarize them and answer all your questions in seconds.

items.name: Navifare - Find Better Flight Deals
items.description: Found a flight? Navifare reads the details and instantly finds cheaper prices across booking sites.

items.name: SMARTlauncher for Google Chrome Apps/Calendar
items.description: SMARTlauncher uses Google Calendar/Apps to find lodging, directions, car, air & curated content all nearby —right from your browser

items.name: Airbnb Reviews Summary - Nomadomia
items.description: Summarizes pros and cons of Airbnb listings, right on the Airbnb site. How It Works: Simply browse Airbnb as usual, and when you…

items.name: Loyalty Point Maximizer for AA Hotels
items.description: Displays Miles per Dollar for AA Hotels listings.

items.name: Drivert - Price Checker for Turo
items.description: Shows Turo true total price (fees, taxes, protection) and finds the cheapest pickup options instantly for free

items.name: DoNotStay – Booking.com 酒店评价分析工具
items.description: 预订前识别差评酒店。AI 分析评价，预警臭虫、噪音、欺诈等问题。免费开始使用。

items.name: The Guestbook Extension: Cash Back on Hotels
items.description: Earn cash back when you book directly with a hotel!

items.name: TravelMonkey - new tab for travellers
items.description: Discover amazing places everytime you open the new tab. Travel the world; one photo at a time.

items.name: Earth View from Google Earth
items.description: Experience a beautiful image from Google Earth every time you open a new tab.
